description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases own <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターンの間、自身の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>をUPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并在<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合内提高自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>。

name.jp: バンディットラッシュ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Defense by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、防御力が<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使防御力提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>이 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n战斗开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。
